mapper.insert: INSERT INTO b_chat_message (sender_id, receiver_id, message, send_time) VALUES (#{senderId}, #{receiverId}, #{message}, #{sendTime})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM b_chat_message WHERE (sender_id = #{senderId} AND receiver_id = #{receiverId}) OR (sender_id = #{receiverId} AND receiver_id = #{senderId}) ORDER BY send_time ASC
